title: User Denies Submitting a Fraudulent Transaction
description: A user performs a financial or sensitive action and later denies having done so. Without non-repudiation controls the organisation cannot prove the action occurred.
mitigation: Capture immutable audit logs including authenticated user ID, timestamp, action performed, and IP address. Store logs in a write-once store. Require explicit user acknowledgement (e.g. digital signature) for high-value operations.
